@graph.name: Arkive
@graph.description: A private, zero-knowledge time-capsule and encrypted Vault app. Send letters, photos and videos to the future, with a hardware-grade private Vault and hand-finished keepsake Relics.

@graph.name: Arkive: Time Capsules
@graph.description: Send photos, videos, voice notes and letters to the future — sealed in a Capsule and delivered on a date you choose. Includes a bank-grade encrypted Vault and optional hand-finished Relics with an NFC card.

offers.name: The Reader
offers.description: Free — one private Capsule, up to twenty memories.

offers.name: Lifetime
offers.description: One-time — everything in The Keeper, kept forever.

acceptedAnswer.text: A Capsule is a small, sealed collection — photos, a voice note, a letter — that you schedule for a future date. You choose the year and the reader; it stays sealed until then.

A Relic is a hand-finished physical keepsake made in Arkive’s atelier. It holds printed photographs and an NFC card linked to a Capsule of your choosing, so a digital memory becomes an object you can hold and pass on.

mainEntity.name: Is the Vault private and encrypted?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. The Vault is a bank-grade encrypted archive for the present, readable only by you. Arkive is zero-knowledge — the shared phrase is the only key.
Arkive is an iPhone app at launch.
The Reader tier is free (one Capsule, up to twenty memories). The Keeper is €119.99/year (about €9.99/month). Lifetime is a one-time €599.99.
